meta.tagline: BCH-native treasuries, streams, payments, and governance

content.headline: The Operating Layer for On-Chain Finance
content.subheadline: FlowGuard helps teams run BCH-native treasuries, streams, recurring payouts, distributions, and governance workflows with contract-backed execution on Bitcoin Cash.

content.headline: Treasury Operations Fail When Execution Is Manual

problems.title: Spreadsheet Governance
problems.description: Payouts tracked in Google Sheets. Approvals happen in Telegram. No on-chain proof.

problems.title: Multisig Fatigue
problems.description: Signers burn out. Transactions pile up. Emergency payouts bypass process.

problems.title: Budget Drift
problems.description: Spending caps exist in docs, not code. Enforcement is social pressure.

content.headline: FlowGuard Vaults: Policy-Driven Treasury Execution
content.description: A vault is a covenant-controlled UTXO. Policies are encoded in the contract. Execution requires valid transactions that satisfy the rules—no backend can override them.

features.title: Contract-Backed Stream Schedules
features.description: Launch linear, cliffed, hybrid, milestone, tranche, and recurring payout flows with BCH-native enforcement and verifiable claim paths.

features.title: Multi-Signature Approval
features.description: Set M-of-N thresholds (2-of-3, 3-of-5, etc.). No single party can drain the vault. Different actions can require different thresholds.

features.title: Spending Guardrails
features.description: Caps per proposal, per period, per recipient. Allowlists and timelocks. All enforced by covenant logic.

features.title: Full Transparency
features.description: Every vault action is visible on-chain: creation, proposals, approvals, executions, cycle releases.

features.title: Non-Custodial Security
features.description: You control your keys. Funds locked in covenant-controlled UTXOs. No admin backdoors.

features.title: BCH Native
features.description: Built with CashScript on Bitcoin Cash. Uses covenant technology for efficient on-chain logic.

content.headline: CashTokens & DAO Governance
content.description: FlowGuard vaults can coordinate BCH, CashTokens fungible tokens, and NFTs across treasury policy, stream funding, distribution programs, and governance execution.

capabilities.title: Token Vesting
capabilities.description: Create linear, cliffed, hybrid, milestone, and tranche schedules for governance tokens, contributor allocations, and ecosystem distributions.

capabilities.title: Token-Weighted Voting
capabilities.description: Optional DAO mode where proposals require governance voting with weight derived from CashToken FT holdings.

capabilities.title: Multi-Asset Treasuries
capabilities.description: Single vault can manage BCH + multiple CashTokens FTs + NFTs with unified policy enforcement.

content.headline: Supported BCH Schedule Families
content.description: FlowGuard uses explicit UTXO state transitions rather than account-model balance streaming. Each schedule family maps to a contract-backed payout path that can be reviewed, signed, and verified on-chain.
features: Hybrid unlocks with an upfront release and linear tail
Milestone unlocks and bounded tranche schedules

content.headline: Spending Guardrails
content.description: Set policy rules that the covenant enforces at execution time.

guardrails.title: Caps Per Proposal
guardrails.description: Maximum amount for any single proposal

guardrails.title: Caps Per Recipient
guardrails.description: Limits on how much any address can receive

guardrails.title: Role-Based Approvals
guardrails.description: Different thresholds for different action types

guardrails.title: Emergency Pause
guardrails.description: Optional pause mechanism for critical situations

content.headline: Built for Integration
content.description: FlowGuard provides transaction templates, policy simulation, and indexer support for fast queries.

current.title: Live on Chipnet
current.description: Vaults, streams, recurring payouts, distributions, and governance flows are running on Chipnet with real wallet signing and contract-backed execution.

upcoming.title: Operational Expansion in Progress
upcoming.description: The next phase focuses on richer treasury reporting, stronger organization workflows, and broader contract-backed schedule families built on the current BCH model.

content.headline: Security & Trust

guarantees.title: Non-Custodial by Design
guarantees.description: No admin keys. No custodial holding accounts. You maintain full control of your private keys.

guarantees.title: On-Chain Enforcement
guarantees.description: All rules enforced by Bitcoin Cash covenants. Policies cannot be bypassed by backend services.

guarantees.title: Scheduled budget unlocks
guarantees.description: Budgets release on fixed intervals — enforced by the script.

guarantees.title: Verifiable treasury state
guarantees.description: All transitions are provable from the chain.

guarantees.title: Open Source
guarantees.description: All contract code is open for review and audit. Built in public and prepared for external security review.

content.audit_status: Contracts designed for professional audit. Formal audit planned before mainnet deployment.

cases.title: Founders & Teams
cases.description: Automate payroll and operational expenses with board approval requirements and spending caps.

cases.title: DAOs
cases.description: Manage community treasuries with transparent governance and recurring contributor payments.

cases.title: Ecosystem Programs
cases.description: Run incentive programs with public accountability and milestone-based releases.

content.headline: Powered by Layla Covenant Technology
content.description: FlowGuard leverages Bitcoin Cash's advanced covenant features to create efficient, modular treasury logic.

technologies.name: Loops
technologies.description: Enables bounded iteration for validating signer sets, approval proofs, and policy checks.

technologies.name: P2S (Pay-to-Script)
technologies.description: Safer and more scalable covenant deployments with improved standard handling.

technologies.name: Bitwise Operations
technologies.description: Efficient state encoding and policy flags for compact on-chain representation.

technologies.name: Functions
technologies.description: Modular, reusable covenant logic for maintainability and auditability.

content.headline: Put Your Treasury on Rules, Not Trust
content.description: FlowGuard gives teams a contract-backed operating layer for treasuries, streams, payments, and governance on Bitcoin Cash.
